testcase.name: test_complete_turn_loop_execution
testcase.error: Godot Runtime Error ! 'at: WorldPhase._auto_assign_crew_tasks (res://src/core/campaign/phases/WorldPhase.gd:220)' Error: 'Invalid cast: could not convert value to 'int'.'
